    print(counts)

from qiskit import QuantumCircuit, execute

def run(self, dag):
    circuit = QuantumCircuit(2)
    circuit.h(0)
    circuit.cx(0, 1)
    result = execute(circuit, backend, shots=1000).result()
    counts = result.get_counts(circuit)
    print(counts)
